MINI MINUTES: JPT Vedica Puri, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter ***. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Gilles Faget is present.
Attorney Saul M. Ferster appearing for plaintiff.

Defendant Frank Iles is present.
Attorney Curtis E. Smolar appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. All parties and counsel are present and confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Settlement reached, terms put on the record and stipulation for settlement filed with the clerk. Trial date is vacated.
